sql_array: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS float_example (id Int32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE float_example SET value = value * 1.1 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, value, value + 1.0 AS incremented_value FROM float_example;
SELECT value, value / 0 AS division_by_zero_result FROM float_example;
